title: Celestial Equipment
description: Celestial Equipment is a tool and armor mod. However, this mod was made for the JustVanilla ModPack. This mod still provides custom ore generation along with tools and armor!
body:
Celestial Equipment
Made By VO!DED


Embark on an epic adventure with the Celestial Equipment Mod, a comprehensive expansion that brings a touch of the cosmos to Minecraft. This mod introduces a new dimension of customization and power with the addition of Celestial-themed gear and items, crafted from the rare and mystical Celestium resources.

Key Features:

Celestial Materials: Discover and mine Celestium Ore, a rare resource that allows you to craft powerful Celestial Equipment. Celestium is found deep underground and can be processed into ingots, blocks, and more.

Celestial Armor and Tools: Equip yourself with Celestial Armor and Tools, each crafted from Celestium Ingots. These items offer superior durability and special attributes to help you conquer the toughest challenges Minecraft has to offer.

Unique Recipes: Utilize custom crafting and smelting recipes to create Celestial Rods, Celestial Blocks, and other unique items. The mod also features new recipes for upgrading Netherite gear into Celestial gear using special templates and ingots.

Celestial Blocks: Transform your surroundings with Celestial Blocks and Raw Celestial Blocks. These blocks add a new layer of aesthetic and functional possibilities to your builds.

Enhanced World Generation: Explore the world with new ore generation features. Celestium Ore spawns in deepslate layers, there's also a unique Celestial Gravel, have fun finding it.

Crafting and Upgrades: Use the Celestial Upgrade Template to enhance your equipment, and explore new crafting options that integrate seamlessly with Minecraft’s existing systems.
